title: Fps Boost Modpack
description: Saffron Optimized is a lightweight performance-focused modpack built to make Minecraft smoother, faster, and more stable — all while keeping the classic vanilla feel. Perfect for both low-end and high-end PCs.
body:
[Fps Boost Modpack]: The Ultimate FPS Boost & Optimization Pack
A lightweight, performance-focused modpack designed to give you maximum FPS, reduce stuttering, and provide the smoothest Minecraft experience possible.

Are you tired of low FPS, annoying lag spikes, and a stuttering framerate ruining your gameplay? The [MODPACK NAME] modpack is your solution! Built on the ultra-efficient Fabric loader, this pack is meticulously configured to push your frames per second to their absolute limit, making Minecraft playable—and enjoyable—on any PC, from a high-end gaming rig to an old "potato" laptop.

🚀 Key Features & Benefits: Why Choose [MODPACK NAME]?
Massive FPS Gains: Experience up to 2x to 5x higher framerates compared to Vanilla Minecraft. Our tests show significantly improved performance across all hardware.

Zero Bloat, Pure Performance: This is a lightweight and minimal modpack. It contains only the essential optimization mods you need, with no unnecessary content or confusing additions that slow you down.

Reduced Lag & Stuttering: Mods like Lithium and Memory Leak Fix address core game inefficiencies, providing a much more stable and smooth gameplay experience by minimizing garbage collection and memory spikes.

Essential Optimization Stack: We include the proven performance triad of Sodium (for rendering), Lithium (for game logic), and Iris (for high-performance shader support).

Shader Ready: Thanks to Iris Shaders, you can use most OptiFine-compatible shader packs with excellent performance. Now you can enjoy beautiful visuals without sacrificing your FPS!

Client & Server Optimized: The pack includes key mods that boost performance both on your client side and when playing on a multiplayer server, ensuring a stable multiplayer experience.

Pre-Configured for Max FPS: All mods and settings are expertly pre-tuned for maximum performance right out of the box. Simply install and enjoy the boost!
